name: DOST-SEI Merit Scholarship
core_values: Excellence in science and technology, service to the nation, innovation for Filipino communities
essay_prompt: Describe how you plan to use science and technology to contribute to Philippine development.

name: CHED UniFAST Tertiary Education Subsidy
core_values: Equity in access to quality education for all Filipinos regardless of income
essay_prompt: How has financial constraint affected your education, and how will this subsidy help you reach your goals?

name: SM Foundation IT Scholarship
core_values: Leadership, community service, perseverance, and giving back to Filipino communities
essay_prompt: Describe a time you demonstrated leadership in your community or school and how IT can be a tool for social good.

name: APC Academic Excellence Grant
benefits: 50–100% tuition discount based on academic ranking
core_values: Innovation, academic excellence, industry-readiness, and technology leadership
essay_prompt: How do you embody APC's vision of producing industry-ready IT professionals who lead with innovation?

name: APC Leadership and Service Scholarship
core_values: Student leadership, volunteerism, and active contribution to the APC community
essay_prompt: Describe your leadership roles and community involvement and how you plan to continue serving the APC community.

name: Chevening Scholarship
benefits: Full funding: tuition, living allowance, flights, visa — UK universities
core_values: Leadership potential, networking, creating positive change in home country
essay_prompt: Demonstrate your leadership qualities and explain how a UK master's degree will help you make a difference in the Philippines.

name: DAAD Development-Related Postgraduate Courses
benefits: Full funding for master's degree in Germany
core_values: Technical excellence, sustainable development, international cooperation
essay_prompt: How will your postgraduate studies in Germany contribute to sustainable development in the Philippines?

name: JASSO Student Exchange Support Program
benefits: Monthly stipend ¥80,000 for exchange studies in Japan
core_values: Cross-cultural understanding, academic excellence, Japan-Philippines friendship
essay_prompt: Why do you want to study in Japan and how will this experience enrich both your academic and personal growth?
